# Texas Hold'em Rules

## Overview

Texas Hold'em is the most popular variant of poker, played with a standard 52-card deck (no jokers). Each player is dealt two private cards (hole cards), and five community cards are dealt face-up on the table. Players make the best five-card hand using any combination of their two hole cards and the five community cards.

## Components

- 1 standard 52-card deck (no jokers)
- Poker chips for betting
- Dealer button to track the dealing position

## Positions

| Position | Abbreviation | Description |
|----------|-------------|-------------|
| Dealer / Button | BTN | Deals cards (or marked by button); acts last post-flop |
| Small Blind | SB | Immediately left of dealer; posts half the big blind |
| Big Blind | BB | Left of SB; posts the minimum forced bet |
| Under the Gun | UTG | Left of BB; first to act pre-flop |
| Middle Position | MP | Between UTG and cutoff |
| Cutoff | CO | Right of dealer; second-best position |

In **heads-up** (2 players): the dealer posts the small blind and acts first pre-flop; the other player posts the big blind.

## Setup

1. Choose a dealer. The dealer button rotates clockwise each hand.
2. The two players to the left of the dealer post forced bets (blinds):
   - **Small Blind**: typically half the big blind
   - **Big Blind**: the minimum bet for the hand
3. Each player receives 2 hole cards face down.

## Card Rankings

Individual cards rank from highest to lowest: **A, K, Q, J, 10, 9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2**. Ace can also serve as low in the straight A-2-3-4-5 (the "wheel"). Suits have **no ranking** in Texas Hold'em.

## Hand Rankings (highest to lowest)

| Rank | Hand | Description | Example |
|------|------|-------------|---------|
| 1 | **Royal Flush** | A-K-Q-J-10 of the same suit | A♠ K♠ Q♠ J♠ 10♠ |
| 2 | **Straight Flush** | Five consecutive cards of the same suit | 9♥ 8♥ 7♥ 6♥ 5♥ |
| 3 | **Four of a Kind** | Four cards of the same rank + 1 kicker | K♣ K♦ K♥ K♠ A♣ |
| 4 | **Full House** | Three of a kind + a pair | Q♦ Q♣ Q♠ 8♥ 8♦ |
| 5 | **Flush** | Five cards of the same suit (not sequential) | A♦ J♦ 8♦ 6♦ 2♦ |
| 6 | **Straight** | Five consecutive cards of mixed suits | 10♣ 9♦ 8♠ 7♥ 6♣ |
| 7 | **Three of a Kind** | Three cards of the same rank + 2 kickers | 7♠ 7♥ 7♦ K♣ 3♠ |
| 8 | **Two Pair** | Two different pairs + 1 kicker | J♣ J♦ 4♠ 4♥ A♣ |
| 9 | **One Pair** | Two cards of the same rank + 3 kickers | 9♠ 9♣ K♦ 7♥ 3♠ |
| 10 | **High Card** | No combination; ranked by highest cards | A♦ J♣ 8♠ 5♥ 2♣ |

## Hand Comparison & Kickers

When two or more players have the **same hand type**, detailed comparison rules apply:

### Royal Flush
Always ties (split pot) — suits do not matter.

### Straight Flush
Compare the **highest card**. Example: 9-8-7-6-5 beats 8-7-6-5-4. The lowest straight flush is A-2-3-4-5 (ace counts as low).

### Four of a Kind
Compare the **quad rank** first. If equal (possible with community cards), compare the **kicker** (the 5th card).

Example: K-K-K-K-A beats Q-Q-Q-Q-A. If both have K-K-K-K, the player with the higher kicker wins.

### Full House
Compare the **three-of-a-kind rank** first, then the **pair rank**.

Example: Q-Q-Q-3-3 beats J-J-J-A-A (queens beat jacks). If trips are the same, higher pair wins: 8-8-8-K-K beats 8-8-8-7-7.

### Flush
Compare cards **from highest to lowest**, one at a time.

Example: A♦-J♦-8♦-6♦-2♦ vs A♣-J♣-8♣-5♣-2♣ — the first player wins because 6 > 5 (the 4th card breaks the tie). If all five cards match in rank, it's a split pot.

### Straight
Compare the **highest card**. A-K-Q-J-10 (broadway) is the highest; A-2-3-4-5 (wheel) is the lowest. 

Example: 10-9-8-7-6 beats 9-8-7-6-5. If the top card is the same, it's always a tie (e.g., both have Q-J-10-9-8).

### Three of a Kind
Compare the **trip rank**, then **kickers** from highest to lowest.

Example: 7-7-7-A-K beats 7-7-7-A-Q (second kicker K > Q).

### Two Pair
Compare the **higher pair** first, then the **lower pair**, then the **kicker**.

Example: K-K-5-5-A beats K-K-4-4-A (second pair 5s > 4s). If both pairs match: K-K-5-5-J beats K-K-5-5-8 (kicker J > 8).

### One Pair
Compare the **pair rank**, then **kickers** from highest to lowest (up to 3 kickers).

Example: 9-9-A-K-7 beats 9-9-A-Q-J (second kicker K > Q).

### High Card
Compare cards from **highest to lowest** until a difference is found.

Example: A-K-8-5-2 beats A-K-7-5-2 (third card 8 > 7).

### Split Pot
If all five cards in the best hand are identical in rank, the pot is split equally. Suits never break ties.

## How to Play

A hand consists of up to four betting rounds. Before each round (except pre-flop), the dealer **burns** one card face down, then deals community cards.

### 1. Pre-Flop
After receiving hole cards, the player left of the big blind (UTG) acts first. Options: fold, call (match the big blind), or raise. Action continues clockwise. The big blind acts last and may check if no raise was made, or raise.

### 2. The Flop
Burn 1 card, then deal **3 community cards** face up. Betting starts with the first active player left of the dealer. Players may now check (since no forced bet exists post-flop).

### 3. The Turn
Burn 1 card, then deal the **4th community card**. Another betting round follows.

### 4. The River
Burn 1 card, then deal the **5th and final community card**. The last betting round occurs.

### 5. Showdown
If two or more players remain, they reveal their hole cards. The player with the best five-card hand (from any combination of 2 hole cards + 5 community cards) wins.

**Showdown order:** The last player to bet or raise shows first. If the river was checked through, the first player left of the button shows first. A player who is beaten may **muck** (fold without showing).

## Betting Rules

### Actions
| Action | When Available | Description |
|--------|---------------|-------------|
| **Check** | No bet this round | Pass without wagering; action moves to next player |
| **Bet** | No bet this round | Open with a wager (minimum = big blind) |
| **Call** | Facing a bet | Match the current highest bet |
| **Raise** | Facing a bet | Increase the bet (minimum raise = previous bet/raise size) |
| **Fold** | Any time | Discard hand; forfeit all chips in the pot |

### Minimum Raise
In no-limit Hold'em, the minimum raise must be at least the size of the previous bet or raise in that round. Example: if the big blind is 100 and a player raises to 300 (a raise of 200), the next raise must be at least 500 (300 + 200).

### Betting Round Ends
When all active players have either matched the highest bet or folded. If only one player remains, they win immediately.

## All-In & Side Pots

A player may go **all-in** by betting all remaining chips at any time.

### Side Pot Rules
When an all-in player has fewer chips than the full bet:
1. A **main pot** is created with the all-in player's contribution (matched by others).
2. A **side pot** is created for additional chips only between players who can cover the bet.
3. All-in players can only win pots they contributed to.
4. Multiple side pots can form if multiple players go all-in for different amounts.

### Example
Player A (500 chips) goes all-in. Player B (1500) calls. Player C (1500) calls.
- Main pot: 500 × 3 = 1500 (A, B, C compete)
- Side pot: 1000 × 2 = 2000 (B and C compete only)

## Special Rules

### The Ace
- **High**: part of A-K-Q-J-10 (broadway straight, royal flush)
- **Low**: part of A-2-3-4-5 (wheel straight, steel wheel straight flush)
- A-2-3-4-5 is the **lowest** straight; it does NOT wrap around (Q-K-A-2-3 is invalid)

### Using Hole Cards
You may use **both, one, or neither** of your hole cards combined with community cards. Your best 5 cards out of the 7 available are selected automatically. If the 5 community cards form the best hand for all remaining players, the pot is split ("playing the board").

### Table Stakes
Players can only bet chips they had at the start of the hand. You cannot add chips mid-hand.

### String Betting
A raise must be announced verbally or made in a single motion. Placing chips in multiple installments without announcing a raise is typically not allowed.

# 德州扑克规则

## 概述

德州扑克是最流行的扑克变体，使用一副标准 52 张扑克牌（不含大小王）。每位玩家获得两张私人手牌（底牌），桌面上会公开翻出五张公共牌。玩家从自己的两张底牌和五张公共牌中选出最佳的五张组合来比拼。

## 组件

- 1 副标准 52 张扑克牌（不含大小王）
- 筹码
- 庄家按钮（Dealer Button）

## 位置

| 位置 | 缩写 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 庄家 / 按钮位 | BTN | 发牌者（或由按钮标记）；翻牌后最后行动 |
| 小盲注 | SB | 庄家左侧；下小盲注 |
| 大盲注 | BB | 小盲左侧；下大盲注（最低强制下注） |
| 枪口位 | UTG | 大盲左侧；翻牌前第一个行动 |
| 中间位 | MP | 枪口位到关煞位之间 |
| 关煞位 | CO | 庄家右侧；第二好的位置 |

**单挑**（2人局）：庄家下小盲注，翻牌前先行动；对手下大盲注。

## 准备

1. 确定庄家。每局结束后庄家按钮顺时针轮转。
2. 庄家左侧的两位玩家需要强制下注（盲注）：
   - **小盲注**：通常为大盲注的一半
   - **大盲注**：本局的最低下注额
3. 每位玩家获得 2 张底牌（面朝下）。

## 单牌大小

单牌从大到小排列：**A、K、Q、J、10、9、8、7、6、5、4、3、2**。A 在顺子 A-2-3-4-5（"轮子"）中可作最小牌使用。德州扑克中**花色不分大小**。

## 牌型等级（从高到低）

| 排名 | 牌型 | 说明 | 示例 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 1 | **皇家同花顺** | 同花的 A-K-Q-J-10 | A♠ K♠ Q♠ J♠ 10♠ |
| 2 | **同花顺** | 五张连续的同花牌 | 9♥ 8♥ 7♥ 6♥ 5♥ |
| 3 | **四条** | 四张同点数 + 1 张踢脚牌 | K♣ K♦ K♥ K♠ A♣ |
| 4 | **葫芦** | 三条 + 一对 | Q♦ Q♣ Q♠ 8♥ 8♦ |
| 5 | **同花** | 五张同花色（非连续） | A♦ J♦ 8♦ 6♦ 2♦ |
| 6 | **顺子** | 五张连续的牌（花色不限） | 10♣ 9♦ 8♠ 7♥ 6♣ |
| 7 | **三条** | 三张同点数 + 2 张踢脚牌 | 7♠ 7♥ 7♦ K♣ 3♠ |
| 8 | **两对** | 两个不同的对子 + 1 张踢脚牌 | J♣ J♦ 4♠ 4♥ A♣ |
| 9 | **一对** | 两张同点数 + 3 张踢脚牌 | 9♠ 9♣ K♦ 7♥ 3♠ |
| 10 | **高牌** | 无任何组合，逐张比大小 | A♦ J♣ 8♠ 5♥ 2♣ |

## 比牌详细规则与踢脚牌（Kicker）

当两名或多名玩家拥有**相同牌型**时，按以下规则详细比较：

### 皇家同花顺
永远平局（平分底池）——花色不分大小。

### 同花顺
比较**最大的一张牌**。例：9-8-7-6-5 > 8-7-6-5-4。最小的同花顺是 A-2-3-4-5（A 算最小）。

### 四条
先比**四条的点数**。若相同（公共牌上有四条时可能出现），再比**踢脚牌**（第 5 张牌）。

举例：K-K-K-K-A > Q-Q-Q-Q-A。若双方都是 K-K-K-K，则谁的踢脚牌更大谁赢。

### 葫芦
先比**三条的点数**，再比**对子的点数**。

举例：Q-Q-Q-3-3 > J-J-J-A-A（Q 的三条 > J 的三条）。三条相同时比对子：8-8-8-K-K > 8-8-8-7-7。

### 同花
**从最大到最小逐张比较**。

举例：A♦-J♦-8♦-6♦-2♦ vs A♣-J♣-8♣-5♣-2♣ —— 第四张牌 6 > 5，第一位玩家赢。如果五张牌点数完全相同，则平分底池。

### 顺子
比较**最大的一张牌**。A-K-Q-J-10（百老汇）最大；A-2-3-4-5（轮子）最小。

举例：10-9-8-7-6 > 9-8-7-6-5。最大牌相同则一定平局（如双方都是 Q-J-10-9-8）。

### 三条
先比**三条的点数**，再依次比**踢脚牌**。

举例：7-7-7-A-K > 7-7-7-A-Q（第二张踢脚牌 K > Q）。

### 两对
先比**较大的对子**，再比**较小的对子**，最后比**踢脚牌**。

举例：K-K-5-5-A > K-K-4-4-A（第二对 5 > 4）。两对都相同时：K-K-5-5-J > K-K-5-5-8（踢脚牌 J > 8）。

### 一对
先比**对子的点数**，再依次比**踢脚牌**（最多 3 张）。

举例：9-9-A-K-7 > 9-9-A-Q-J（第二张踢脚牌 K > Q）。

### 高牌
**从最大到最小逐张比较**，直到分出胜负。

举例：A-K-8-5-2 > A-K-7-5-2（第三张 8 > 7）。

### 平分底池
如果最终五张最佳手牌的点数**完全相同**，底池平分。花色永远不会用于决定胜负。

## 游戏流程

每手牌最多四个下注轮。每轮发公共牌前（翻牌前除外），庄家先**烧掉**一张牌（面朝下弃掉），再发公共牌。

### 1. 翻牌前（Pre-Flop）
拿到底牌后，大盲注左侧的玩家（枪口位）首先行动。可选操作：弃牌、跟注（匹配大盲注）、加注。依次顺时针行动。大盲注最后行动，无人加注时可选择过牌或加注。

### 2. 翻牌圈（Flop）
烧 1 张牌，翻开 **3 张公共牌**。从庄家左侧第一位未弃牌的玩家开始下注。此时起玩家可以选择过牌（因为没有强制下注）。

### 3. 转牌圈（Turn）
烧 1 张牌，翻开**第 4 张公共牌**。进行新一轮下注。

### 4. 河牌圈（River）
烧 1 张牌，翻开**第 5 张也是最后一张公共牌**。进行最后一轮下注。

### 5. 摊牌（Showdown）
如果两名或更多玩家未弃牌，则亮出底牌比大小。从 2 张底牌 + 5 张公共牌中取最佳 5 张，牌型最好的玩家赢得底池。

**摊牌顺序：** 最后一个下注或加注的玩家先亮牌。如果河牌圈全部过牌，则庄家左侧第一位玩家先亮牌。被击败的玩家可以选择**盖牌**（不亮牌直接弃掉）。

## 下注规则

### 操作一览
| 操作 | 条件 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| **过牌** | 本轮无人下注 | 不下注、不弃牌，行动传给下家 |
| **下注** | 本轮无人下注 | 开启下注（最低 = 大盲注金额） |
| **跟注** | 面对下注 | 匹配当前最高下注额 |
| **加注** | 面对下注 | 提高下注（最低加注额 = 上一次的下注/加注额度） |
| **弃牌** | 任何时候 | 放弃手牌，丧失底池中已投入的所有筹码 |

### 最低加注额
在无限注德州扑克中，加注额必须**至少等于上一次下注或加注的幅度**。例如：大盲注为 100，有人加注到 300（加注幅度为 200），则下一次加注至少要到 500（300 + 200）。

### 下注轮结束
当所有活跃玩家都已经匹配最高下注额或弃牌。如果只剩一名玩家，该玩家立即获胜。

## 全押（All-In）与边池

玩家可以随时将所有剩余筹码**全部押入**。

### 边池规则
当全押玩家的筹码少于完整的下注额时：
1. 用全押玩家的贡献额（其他人等额匹配）形成**主池**。
2. 超出部分形成**边池**，只有能覆盖该下注的玩家竞争。
3. 全押玩家只能赢取自己参与的底池。
4. 多人以不同金额全押时，会形成多个边池。

### 举例
玩家 A（500 筹码）全押。玩家 B（1500）跟注。玩家 C（1500）跟注。
- 主池：500 × 3 = 1500（A、B、C 竞争）
- 边池：1000 × 2 = 2000（仅 B 和 C 竞争）

## 特殊规则

### A（Ace）的用法
- **最大**：A-K-Q-J-10 组成百老汇顺子（Broadway）或皇家同花顺
- **最小**：A-2-3-4-5 组成轮子顺子（Wheel）或最小同花顺（Steel Wheel）
- A-2-3-4-5 是**最小的顺子**；顺子不能"绕回来"（如 Q-K-A-2-3 无效）

### 底牌的使用
你可以使用**两张、一张或零张**底牌与公共牌搭配。系统自动从 7 张可用牌中选出最佳 5 张。如果 5 张公共牌本身就是所有玩家的最佳手牌，则平分底池（俗称"打公共牌"）。

### 桌面筹码规则
玩家只能使用发牌时已在桌面上的筹码。一手牌进行中不能额外购买筹码。

### 分次下注限制
加注必须**口头宣告**或**一次性推出筹码**。未经宣告的分次放入筹码（String Bet）通常不被允许。

# TACTA Rules

## Overview

TACTA is a sneakily strategic card placement game published by The Op (USAopoly). Players flip, twist, and turn their cards to align shapes and cover their opponents' dots while protecting their own. When all cards are played, the player with the most visible dots of their color wins.

## Components

- 108 playing cards (6 colored decks of 18 cards each)
- 1 Starting card (marked with an X)

## Setup

1. Choose a table or flat play area with ample space. The table edge marks the boundary — cards cannot go beyond it.
2. Place the **Starting card** in the center of the play area.
3. Sort cards by color. Each player takes one color deck (18 cards) and shuffles it.
4. Hold your deck as a stack in your hand. **Never fan or look through your cards.** You may only access the two outermost cards (top and bottom) at any time.
5. The player with the lowest value on either of their outermost cards goes first. Play proceeds clockwise.

## How to Play

On your turn, choose one of your two accessible cards (top or bottom of your deck) and play it to the table.

### Placing a Card

- You may **flip and/or rotate** your card freely before placing.
- Your card must **connect to exactly one card** already on the table by covering one of its shapes.
- When shapes match and align correctly, the **outline of the underlying card appears continuous** — this confirms a legal placement.
- Hollow shapes and dot-filled shapes are interchangeable for matching purposes.
- A card may **only connect to one** existing card (not bridge two cards).

### When You Cannot Play

If neither of your accessible cards can legally cover any shape on the table, play one card **face-up anywhere** on the table that does not touch any existing card.

### Illegal Plays

If an illegal card placement is discovered, remove the card — unless another card has already been placed on top of it, in which case it stays.

## Scoring

When all players have played all their cards, count the **visible dots of your color** on the table. That is your score.

The player with the **most visible dots** wins. Ties are shared victories.

## Variants

### Speed Mode (No Turns)
All players play simultaneously. Countdown 3-2-1, Go! Play as fast as you can following all placement rules. You cannot play on a card of your own color. The game ends when any player plays their last card.

### Team Mode
Play in teams with teammates sitting across from each other. Each teammate uses a 9-card half-deck.

### Three-Round Mode
Separate cards by suit symbol. Play 3 rounds using a different suit each round. Total dots across all rounds determines the winner.

# TACTA 规则

## 概述

TACTA 是一款由 The Op（USAopoly）出版的策略卡牌放置游戏。玩家翻转、旋转卡牌来对齐形状，覆盖对手的圆点同时保护自己的。当所有卡牌打完后，拥有最多可见圆点的玩家获胜。

## 组件

- 108 张游戏卡牌（6 种颜色的牌组，每组 18 张）
- 1 张起始卡（标有 X）

## 准备

1. 选择桌面或平坦的游戏区域。桌子边缘为边界——卡牌不能超出。
2. 将**起始卡**放在游戏区域中央。
3. 按颜色分牌。每位玩家选取一种颜色（18 张）并洗匀。
4. 将牌堆叠握在手中。**不可展开或翻看牌堆。**你任何时候只能使用最外面的两张（顶部和底部）。
5. 外露卡牌上数值最低的玩家先手。顺时针进行。

## 游戏流程

轮到你时，从两张可用卡牌（牌堆顶部或底部）中选一张打到桌面上。

### 放置卡牌

- 放置前可以自由**翻面和/或旋转**卡牌。
- 必须**连接桌面上已有的一张卡牌**，覆盖其上的一个形状。
- 形状匹配且对齐时，**底下卡牌的轮廓线看起来是连续的**——这说明放置合法。
- 空心形状和有圆点的形状可以互相匹配。
- 一张卡牌**只能连接一张**已有卡牌（不能同时搭桥连两张）。

### 无法放置时

如果两张可用卡牌都无法合法覆盖任何形状，将一张卡牌**面朝上放在桌面任意位置**，但不能接触任何已有卡牌。

### 违规放置

发现违规放置的卡牌应移除——除非上面已被其他卡牌覆盖，此时保留不动。

## 计分

所有玩家打完所有卡牌后，计算桌面上你颜色的**可见圆点数量**，即为你的得分。

**圆点最多**的玩家获胜。平局则共同获胜。

## 变体模式

### 速度模式（无回合制）
所有玩家同时游戏。倒数 3-2-1 开始！在遵守放置规则的前提下尽快出牌。不能在自己颜色的卡牌上放置。任意玩家打完最后一张牌时游戏立即结束。

### 组队模式
两人组队，队友对面而坐。每人使用 9 张半组牌。

### 三局制
按中心符号分牌。每局使用不同符号，共玩 3 局。三局总圆点数决定胜负。

# GoTown (Skyscraper) Rules

## Overview

GoTown is a competitive card game published by Helvetiq, designed by Morten & Alexander Bonavent. Each player races to build a five-story skyscraper first. Floors are built by combining two cards that sum to 9. But watch out — opponents can steal your floors, destroy them, or mess with your plans!

## Components

- 32 Floor cards (values 1-8, 4 of each)
- 4 Joker cards (wild — player chooses value when played)
- 18 Special cards:
  - Thief / Super Thief
  - Jackhammer / Wrecking Ball
  - Guard Dog / Bone
  - Food Truck (skip turn)

## Setup

1. Shuffle all cards together.
2. Deal **5 cards** to each player.
3. Place the remaining deck face down as the draw pile.
4. Choose a starting player. Play proceeds clockwise.

## How to Play

On your turn:

1. **Draw 1 card** from the draw pile.
2. **Perform any number of actions** (in any order):

### Build a Floor
Play **2 floor cards** from your hand that add up to exactly **9** (e.g., 3+6, 4+5, 1+8). Place them side by side in front of you as one floor of your tower. Stack new floors on top of previous ones.

**Joker cards** are wild — they can represent any value when building.

### Steal a Floor
Play **1 floor card** that complements a solitary card on an opponent's top floor (the two must sum to 9). Take their card and combine it with yours to build a floor on your own tower.

- Jokers on opponents' floors can be stolen, but they keep their assigned value.
- Jokers in your hand **cannot** be used to steal.

### Play Special Cards

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Guard Dog** | Attach to any of your floors. Protects it from being stolen or destroyed. |
| **Bone** | Removes a Guard Dog from any floor (yours or opponent's). |
| **Jackhammer** | Destroy an opponent's **top floor** (unprotected). Both cards go to discard. |
| **Wrecking Ball** | Destroy **any floor** of an opponent's tower (unprotected), not just the top. |
| **Thief** | Steal 1 random card from an opponent's hand. |
| **Super Thief** | Look at an opponent's hand and steal 1 card of your choice. |
| **Food Truck** | Force an opponent to **skip their next turn**. |

## Key Rules

- There is no hand limit.
- If the draw pile runs out, shuffle the discard pile to form a new draw pile.
- A floor protected by a Guard Dog cannot be stolen or destroyed until the Dog is removed with a Bone.
- You can build multiple floors in a single turn if you have the cards.

## Winning

The **first player** to complete **5 floors** on their tower wins immediately!
rules.zh:
# 摩天大楼（GoTown）规则

## 概述

摩天大楼（GoTown）是由 Helvetiq 出版、Morten & Alexander Bonavent 设计的竞争性卡牌游戏。每位玩家争先建造一座五层高的摩天大楼。每层楼由两张数值相加等于 9 的卡牌组成。但要小心——对手可以偷走你的楼层、摧毁它们，或者打乱你的计划！

## 组件

- 32 张楼层卡（数值 1-8，每种 4 张）
- 4 张百搭卡（万能——打出时自选数值）
- 18 张特殊卡：
  - 小偷 / 超级小偷
  - 电钻 / 拆楼球
  - 看门狗 / 骨头
  - 餐车（跳过回合）

## 准备

1. 将所有卡牌洗匀。
2. 每位玩家发 **5 张**手牌。
3. 剩余牌面朝下作为抽牌堆。
4. 选定起始玩家，顺时针进行。

## 游戏流程

轮到你时：

1. 从抽牌堆**抽 1 张**牌。
2. 执行**任意数量的行动**（顺序不限）：

### 建造楼层
打出手中**两张楼层卡**，数值相加恰好等于 **9**（如 3+6、4+5、1+8）。将它们并排放在面前作为你的大楼的一层。新楼层叠放在已有楼层上方。

**百搭卡**可以代表任意数值来配对建造。

### 偷取楼层
打出 **1 张楼层卡**，与对手最顶层的一张单独楼层卡配对（两者之和必须等于 9）。拿走对手的卡牌，与你打出的卡组合成自己大楼的一层。

- 对手楼层上的百搭卡可以被偷，但保持其原定数值。
- 手中的百搭卡**不能**用于偷取。

### 使用特殊卡

| 卡牌 | 效果 |
|------|------|
| **看门狗** | 附加到自己的任意一层楼上。保护该层不被偷取或摧毁。 |
| **骨头** | 移除任意一层楼上的看门狗（自己或对手的均可）。 |
| **电钻** | 摧毁对手**最顶层**（未受保护的）。两张牌均弃掉。 |
| **拆楼球** | 摧毁对手大楼的**任意一层**（未受保护的），不限于顶层。 |
| **小偷** | 从一名对手手中随机偷取 1 张牌。 |
| **超级小偷** | 查看一名对手的手牌，选择偷取其中 1 张。 |
| **餐车** | 强制一名对手**跳过下一回合**。 |

## 关键规则

- 没有手牌上限。
- 抽牌堆用完时，洗匀弃牌堆形成新的抽牌堆。
- 受看门狗保护的楼层在狗被骨头移除前，不能被偷取或摧毁。
- 手牌足够的话，一回合可以建造多层。

## 获胜条件

**率先**建成 **5 层**大楼的玩家立即获胜！

rules.en:
# Just Wild (King of the Wilderness) Rules

## Overview

Just Wild is a number puzzle and area control card game published by Helvetiq, designed by Marco Franchin and Leo Colovini. Players choose an endangered animal species — lynx, wolf, ibex, or bear — and strategically place numbered cards to expand their territory while covering opponents' animals. The player with the most visible half cards of their species at the end wins.

## Components

- 80 cards numbered 1–10 (20 per species: lynx, wolf, ibex, bear)
- 24 animal tokens (6 per species; each player uses 5)

Each card is double-sided: the front shows the card value and the animal, while the back shows two numbers whose sum equals the front value.

## Setup

1. Each player chooses an animal species and takes that species' 20-card deck and **5 tokens**. Return unused cards and tokens to the box.
2. Each player shuffles their deck, draws the **top card**, and places it **face up** in the center of the table. All cards must be adjacent and form a rectangle.
3. Draw **3 cards** as your starting hand. Place the rest of your deck face down as your **personal draw pile**.
4. The last player to have spotted a wild animal starts the game.

## How to Play

Players take turns clockwise. On your turn, you must place a card on the table, then **refill your hand to 3 cards** from your personal draw pile.

### Option A: Play a Card Face Up (Cover)

Place a card **face up** so that it covers **exactly half of two adjacent cards**. The value on your card must equal the **sum of the two covered halves**.

- You are **not allowed** to entirely cover a single card.

**When the sum exceeds 10:** You must play **2 cards** — first play one card face up covering the two halves, then play the top card from your draw pile **face down** anywhere adjacent to an existing card. The face-down card counts as value 10, which is added to your face-up card's value to reach the required sum. (If your draw pile is empty, you cannot perform this action.)

### Option B: Play a Card Face Down (Expand)

If you cannot or choose not to cover any cards, play one card from your hand **face down** adjacent to any existing card on the table. Face-down cards can be covered on future turns following normal rules.

### Special Cards (Baby Animals)

Each species has 10 special cards showing baby animals (numbered 1–10). When you play a baby animal card **face up**, you may place one of your **tokens** on one of the two half cards it covers. A token-protected half card **can never be covered** for the rest of the game.

- You only have **5 tokens** — use them wisely.
- Once placed, tokens cannot be moved or taken back.

## Card Back Information

The back of every card shows two numbers whose sum equals the front value. This means you can deduce the front value of face-down cards (yours or opponents') by reading the numbers on the back.

## End of Game & Scoring

Players do **not** end the game simultaneously. When you play your **last card**:

1. Count your score immediately: each **visible half card** of your species on the table = **1 point**.
2. Record your score — it is final even if your cards get covered later by other players.

After all players have played all their cards, compare scores. The player with the **highest score** wins.

**Tiebreaker:** The player with the most **unused tokens** wins. If still tied, the victory is shared.
rules.zh:
# 荒野之王（Just Wild）规则

## 概述

《荒野之王》（Just Wild）是由 Helvetiq 出版，Marco Franchin 和 Leo Colovini 设计的数字拼图区域控制卡牌游戏。玩家选择一种濒危动物——猞猁、狼、野山羊或熊，通过策略性地放置编号卡牌来扩展领地，同时覆盖对手的动物。游戏结束时，自己物种可见半面卡牌最多的玩家获胜。

## 组件

- 80 张编号 1-10 的卡牌（每种动物 20 张：猞猁、狼、野山羊、熊）
- 24 个动物指示物（每种 6 个；每位玩家使用 5 个）

每张卡牌双面印刷：正面显示数值和动物图案，背面显示两个数字，其和等于正面数值。

## 准备

1. 每位玩家选择一种动物，拿取该物种的 20 张卡牌和 **5 个指示物**。多余的卡牌和指示物放回游戏盒。
2. 各自洗匀卡牌，抽取**第一张牌面朝上**放在桌面中央。所有卡牌必须相邻排列，形成矩形。
3. 抽取 **3 张**卡牌作为起始手牌。剩余卡牌面朝下放在面前作为**个人抽牌堆**。
4. 最后见过野生动物的玩家先手。

## 游戏流程

玩家按顺时针依次行动。轮到你时，必须将一张卡牌放到桌面上，然后从个人抽牌堆**补满手牌至 3 张**。

### 选项 A：面朝上打出卡牌（覆盖）

将卡牌**面朝上**放置，恰好覆盖**两张相邻卡牌的各一半**。你打出的卡牌数值必须等于**被覆盖的两个半面数值之和**。

- **不允许**完整覆盖单独一张卡牌。

**当两个半面之和超过 10 时：** 需要打出**两张牌**——先将一张牌面朝上覆盖目标两个半面，然后从抽牌堆顶取一张牌**面朝下**放置在桌面上与现有卡牌相邻的任意位置。面朝下的牌计为数值 10，加上面朝上卡牌的数值之和等于所需总和。（如果抽牌堆已空，则无法执行此操作。）

### 选项 B：面朝下打出卡牌（扩展）

如果无法或不想覆盖任何卡牌，从手牌中打出一张**面朝下**放在桌面上与任意现有卡牌相邻的位置。面朝下的卡牌在后续回合可被正常规则覆盖。

### 特殊卡（宝宝动物）

每种动物有 10 张特殊卡，印有宝宝动物图案（编号 1-10）。当你**面朝上**打出宝宝动物卡时，可以将一个**指示物**放在它覆盖的两个半面卡牌之一上。被指示物保护的半面卡牌在整场游戏中**永远不能被覆盖**。

- 你只有 **5 个指示物**——明智使用。
- 指示物一旦放置，不可移动或收回。

## 卡牌背面信息

每张卡牌背面显示两个数字，其和等于正面数值。这意味着你可以通过背面的数字推断出面朝下卡牌（自己或对手的）的正面数值。

## 游戏结束与计分

各玩家**不会同时结束**游戏。当你打出**最后一张牌**时：

1. 立即计算得分：桌面上你的物种每个**可见的半面卡牌** = **1 分**。
2. 记录你的分数——这是最终得分，即使之后你的卡牌被其他玩家覆盖也不变。

当所有玩家打完所有牌后，比较得分。**最高分**的玩家获胜。

**平局处理：** 未使用**指示物更多**的玩家获胜。如果仍然平局，则共享胜利。

rules.en:
# Dirty Pig (Drecksau) Rules

## Overview

Dirty Pig (originally Drecksau) is a quick and fun card game designed by Frank Bebenroth and published by KOSMOS. Each player has a row of clean pigs, and the goal is simple: be the first player to make ALL of your pigs dirty! Play mud cards, protect your pigs with barns, and use rain to wash your opponents' pigs clean.

## Components

- Pig cards (double-sided: clean on one side, dirty on the other)
- Mud cards
- Rain cards
- Barn cards
- Lightning cards
- Lightning Rod cards
- Farmer cards (scrubs pigs clean)
- Barn Door cards (locks the barn)

## Setup

1. Each player receives pig cards based on player count:
   - **2 players**: 5 pigs each
   - **3 players**: 4 pigs each
   - **4 players**: 3 pigs each
2. Place all pig cards **clean side up** in front of each player.
3. Shuffle all remaining cards and deal **3 cards** to each player.
4. Place the rest face down as the draw pile.

## How to Play

On your turn, you **must play 1 card** from your hand, then **draw 1 card** from the draw pile.

### Card Effects

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Mud** | Flip one of your clean pigs to the **dirty side** |
| **Rain** | ALL unprotected dirty pigs (all players) are washed **clean** |
| **Barn** | Place on one of your pigs. Protects that pig from Rain |
| **Lightning** | Destroy one opponent's Barn (remove it from the game) |
| **Lightning Rod** | Attach to one of your Barns. Protects it from Lightning permanently |
| **Farmer** | The farmer scrubs one dirty pig clean — even pigs inside a Barn! |
| **Barn Door** | Attach to your Barn (must already contain a dirty pig). Protects against the Farmer |

### Special Rules

- If you **cannot play** any of your 3 cards, reveal your hand to all players, discard all 3 cards, and draw 3 new cards.
- A pig in a Barn with a Door and a Lightning Rod is **fully protected** from all threats.
- Cards played on opponents' pigs (Rain, Lightning, Farmer) are discarded after use.
- When the draw pile is empty, shuffle the discard pile to form a new draw pile.

## Winning

The **first player** to have ALL of their pigs showing the dirty side wins immediately!
rules.zh:
# 脏小猪（Drecksau）规则

## 概述

脏小猪（原名 Drecksau）是由 Frank Bebenroth 设计、KOSMOS 出版的快速卡牌游戏。每位玩家面前有一排干净的小猪，目标很简单：率先让自己所有的小猪都变脏！打出泥巴牌弄脏小猪，用谷仓保护它们，同时用雨水冲洗对手的小猪。

## 组件

- 小猪牌（双面卡：一面干净、一面脏）
- 泥巴牌
- 雨水牌
- 谷仓牌
- 闪电牌
- 避雷针牌
- 农夫牌（给小猪洗澡）
- 谷仓门牌（锁住谷仓）

## 准备

1. 根据人数分配小猪牌：
   - **2 人局**：每人 5 只小猪
   - **3 人局**：每人 4 只小猪
   - **4 人局**：每人 3 只小猪
2. 将所有小猪牌**干净面朝上**放在每位玩家面前。
3. 将其余卡牌洗匀，每位玩家发 **3 张**手牌。
4. 剩余牌面朝下作为抽牌堆。

## 游戏流程

轮到你时，**必须打出 1 张**手牌，然后从抽牌堆**抽 1 张**。

### 卡牌效果

| 卡牌 | 效果 |
|------|------|
| **泥巴** | 将自己的一只干净小猪翻到**脏面** |
| **雨水** | 所有未受保护的脏小猪（所有玩家）被冲洗回**干净面** |
| **谷仓** | 放在自己的一只小猪上。保护该小猪免受雨水影响 |
| **闪电** | 摧毁对手的一个谷仓（移出游戏） |
| **避雷针** | 附加到自己的谷仓上。永久保护该谷仓免受闪电攻击 |
| **农夫** | 农夫给一只脏小猪洗澡——即使在谷仓里也逃不掉！ |
| **谷仓门** | 附加到自己的谷仓（谷仓内必须已有脏小猪）。保护小猪免受农夫影响 |

### 特殊规则

- 如果你的 3 张手牌**都无法出牌**，向所有玩家展示手牌后全部弃掉，重新抽 3 张。
- 一只小猪同时拥有谷仓、谷仓门和避雷针时**完全安全**，不受任何威胁。
- 对对手使用的卡牌（雨水、闪电、农夫）使用后弃掉。
- 抽牌堆用完时，将弃牌堆洗匀形成新的抽牌堆。

## 获胜条件

**率先**让自己所有小猪都翻到脏面的玩家立即获胜！

rules.en:
# Pig Pageant (Drecksau: Sauschön) Rules

## Overview

Pig Pageant is an expansion for Dirty Pig (Drecksau) by Frank Bebenroth, published by Kosmos. It adds a new victory path: instead of only winning with all dirty pigs, you can now also win by making all your pigs into glamorous pageant contestants! **Requires the Dirty Pig base game.**

## New Components

- 16 Pretty Pig (Schönsau) cards
- 12 Escape (Aus dem Staub) cards
- 4 Lucky Bird (Glücksvogel) cards
- 3 Mud Bucket markers + 3 Trophy markers (for tournament scoring)

## Setup

Shuffle all expansion cards into the base game deck. Each player starts with 3 pigs (clean side up) and 3 hand cards, same as the base game.

## New Win Condition

You win by being the first to have ALL your pigs in the **same state**:
- **All Dirty Pigs** — win the Mud Bucket
- **All Pretty Pigs** — win the Golden Trophy

## New Card Effects

### Pretty Pig (Schönsau)
Place on **any** pig card (yours or opponent's), whether clean or dirty. The pig becomes a Pretty Pig.

**Special protections:**
- A Pretty Pig has an **umbrella** — it stays pretty even in the Rain (Rain cards have no effect)
- A barn with a Pretty Pig **cannot be nailed shut** (Farmer's Revenge cannot be attached)
- The "Farmer Scrubs" card **cannot remove** a Pretty Pig

**Restriction:** Cannot be placed on a dirty pig that is in a locked barn (dirty + barn + nailed shut). That pig is the "happiest dirty pig" and must stay dirty for the rest of the game.

### Escape (Aus dem Staub)
Play this card together with a Pretty Pig card to **remove** the Pretty Pig status. The card underneath returns to its previous state (clean or dirty). Can be used on your own or an opponent's Pretty Pig.

This is the **only way** to remove a Pretty Pig card.

### Lucky Bird (Glücksvogel)
Play this card along with **all your other hand cards** (play them all at once for their effects). Then draw **3 new cards** from the draw pile.

## Strategy Tips

- The game is now much more dynamic — your strategy might change mid-game
- Watch your opponents' pigs: if they're close to all-dirty, consider making one of theirs pretty
- The Lucky Bird is very powerful — save it for a big combo turn
rules.zh:
# 小猪选美（Drecksau: Sauschön）规则

## 概述

《小猪选美》是 Frank Bebenroth 设计、Kosmos 出版的《脏小猪》扩展包。它增加了全新的胜利路线：除了让所有猪变脏获胜外，现在还可以通过让所有猪变成漂亮的选美冠军来获胜！**需要脏小猪本体游戏。**

## 新增组件

- 16 张漂亮小猪卡
- 12 张逃走卡
- 4 张幸运小鸟卡
- 3 个泥桶标记 + 3 个奖杯标记（用于锦标赛计分）

## 准备

将所有扩展卡洗入本体牌堆。每位玩家从 3 只猪（干净面朝上）和 3 张手牌开始，与本体规则相同。

## 新的获胜条件

率先让所有猪处于**同一状态**即可获胜：
- **全部是脏小猪** — 赢得泥桶
- **全部是漂亮小猪** — 赢得金奖杯

## 新增卡牌效果

### 漂亮小猪卡（Schönsau）
放置在**任意一张**猪卡上（自己或对手的，无论干净或肮脏）。该猪变成漂亮小猪。

**特殊保护：**
- 漂亮小猪有**雨伞** — 即使下雨也保持漂亮（雨卡无效）
- 有漂亮小猪的猪圈**不能被钉死**（不能附加农夫复仇卡）
- "农夫刷猪"卡**不能移除**漂亮小猪

**限制：** 不能放在已锁定猪圈中的脏猪上（脏猪 + 猪圈 + 钉死）。那只猪是"最幸福的脏猪"，本局游戏中必须保持脏的状态。

### 逃走卡（Aus dem Staub）
与一张漂亮小猪卡**一起打出**，移除该猪的漂亮状态。下面的猪恢复原来的状态（干净或肮脏）。可用于自己或对手的漂亮小猪。

这是移除漂亮小猪卡的**唯一方法**。

### 幸运小鸟卡（Glücksvogel）
打出此卡时，同时打出**所有其他手牌**（一次性发动所有效果）。然后从抽牌堆抽取 **3 张**新卡。

## 策略提示

- 游戏节奏变得更加多变 — 你的策略可能中途转换
- 关注对手的猪：如果他们快全部变脏了，考虑把他们的一只变漂亮
- 幸运小鸟非常强力 — 留着配合大量卡牌一次性爆发

# Catan Rules

## Overview

Catan (formerly The Settlers of Catan) is a multiplayer board game designed by Klaus Teuber. Players assume the roles of settlers, each attempting to build and develop holdings while trading and acquiring resources.

## Components

- 19 hexagonal terrain tiles
- 6 sea frame pieces
- 9 harbor pieces
- 18 circular number tokens
- 95 resource cards (19 each of Brick, Grain, Lumber, Ore, and Wool)
- 25 development cards (14 Knight, 6 Progress, 5 Victory Point)
- 4 building cost cards
- 2 special cards (Longest Road, Largest Army)
- 16 cities, 20 settlements, 60 roads (in 4 colors)
- 2 dice
- 1 robber

## Setup

1. Assemble the board frame using the 6 sea pieces.
2. Place the 19 terrain tiles randomly inside the frame.
3. Place the numbered tokens on the terrain tiles in alphabetical order (skip the desert).
4. The desert gets no number token; place the robber on the desert.
5. Each player chooses a color and takes 5 settlements, 4 cities, and 15 roads.
6. Starting with the oldest player, each player places one settlement and one road. Then in reverse order, each player places a second settlement and one road.
7. Each player receives starting resources: one resource card for each terrain hex adjacent to their second settlement.

## Turn Structure

### 1. Roll the Dice
Roll both dice. The sum determines which hexes produce resources. Any hex with that number produces one resource card for each adjacent settlement and two for each adjacent city. If a 7 is rolled, the Robber is activated.

### 2. Trade
You may trade resources with other players or use maritime trade (4:1 or better with harbors).

### 3. Build
You may build roads, settlements, cities, or buy development cards:

- **Road** (Brick + Lumber): Place on a path adjacent to your own road, settlement, or city.
- **Settlement** (Brick + Lumber + Grain + Wool): Place at an intersection connected to your road.
- **City** (3 Ore + 2 Grain): Replace one of your settlements. Cities produce 2 resources instead of 1.
- **Development Card** (Ore + Grain + Wool): Draw the top card of the development deck.

## Ending the Game

The first player to reach 10 victory points (on their turn) wins. Victory points come from:
- Settlements: 1 VP each
- Cities: 2 VP each
- Victory Point development cards: 1 VP each
- Longest Road: 2 VP
- Largest Army: 2 VP

## Special Rules

### The Robber
On a roll of 7:
- Any player with more than 7 resource cards discards half (rounded down).
- Move the robber to any hex.
- Steal one random resource card from a player with a settlement/city adjacent to that hex.
- That hex produces no resources while the robber occupies it.
rules.zh:
# 卡坦岛规则

## 游戏概述

《卡坦岛》（原名《卡坦岛拓荒者》）是由 Klaus Teuber 设计的多人桌游。玩家扮演拓荒者，通过交易和获取资源来建造和发展自己的领地。

## 游戏组件

- 19 块六边形地形板块
- 6 块海洋框架
- 9 个港口标记
- 18 个圆形数字标记
- 95 张资源卡（砖块、谷物、木材、矿石、羊毛各19张）
- 25 张发展卡（14 张士兵、6 张进步、5 张胜利点）
- 4 张建筑费用参考卡
- 2 张特殊卡（最长道路、最大军队）
- 16 座城市、20 个村庄、60 条道路（共4种颜色）
- 2 颗骰子
- 1 个强盗标记

## 游戏准备

1. 用 6 块海洋框架拼出游戏边界。
2. 将 19 块地形板块随机放置在框架内。
3. 按字母顺序将数字标记放在地形板块上（跳过沙漠）。
4. 沙漠不放数字标记，强盗初始放在沙漠上。
5. 每位玩家选择一种颜色，拿取 5 个村庄、4 座城市和 15 条道路。
6. 从最年长的玩家开始，每人放置 1 个村庄和 1 条道路。然后逆序，每人放置第 2 个村庄和 1 条道路。
7. 玩家获得起始资源：第二个村庄相邻的每个地形产生 1 张对应资源卡。

## 回合流程

### 1. 掷骰子
掷两颗骰子。点数总和决定哪些地形产出资源。拥有相邻村庄的地形产1张资源，相邻城市的产2张。掷出7点时触发强盗。

### 2. 交易
可以与其他玩家交易资源，或使用海洋贸易（4:1，港口可降低比例）。

### 3. 建造
可以建造道路、村庄、城市或购买发展卡：

- **道路**（砖块+木材）：放在已有道路、村庄或城市旁边的路径上。
- **村庄**（砖块+木材+谷物+羊毛）：放在与你的道路相连的交叉点上。
- **城市**（3矿石+2谷物）：替换你的一座村庄。城市产出2倍资源。
- **发展卡**（矿石+谷物+羊毛）：从发展卡堆顶抽取一张。

## 游戏结束

率先在自己回合内达到 10 个胜利点的玩家获胜。胜利点来源：
- 村庄：1 分
- 城市：2 分
- 胜利点发展卡：1 分
- 最长道路：2 分
- 最大军队：2 分

## 特殊规则

### 强盗
掷出 7 点时：
- 手牌超过 7 张的玩家弃掉一半（向下取整）。
- 将强盗移到任意地形。
- 从该地形相邻拥有村庄/城市的玩家中随机偷取一张资源。
- 强盗所在的地形不产出资源。

rules.en:
# Sea Salt & Paper Rules

## Overview

Sea Salt & Paper is a set-collection and push-your-luck card game for 2-4 players, published by Bombyx. Beautifully illustrated with origami-style marine creatures, players collect cards to form scoring combinations, play Duo pairs for special effects, and decide the perfect moment to end each round. The first player to reach the target score wins.

## Components

- 58 playing cards (origami sea creatures in various colors)
- 4 player aid cards
- 2 card distribution reference cards

## Setup

1. Shuffle all 58 playing cards and place them face-down as the draw pile.
2. Reveal the **top 2 cards** and place them face-up next to the deck to form **two discard piles**.
3. Choose the first player randomly.
4. Set the **target score** based on player count:
   - **2 players**: 40 points
   - **3 players**: 35 points
   - **4 players**: 30 points

## How to Play

On your turn, perform these steps in order:

### 1. Take a Card (Mandatory)

Choose **one** of these options:
- **Draw from deck**: Draw 2 cards from the draw pile, keep 1, and place the other face-up on either discard pile (if a discard pile is empty, you must place it there first)
- **Take from discard**: Take the top card from one of the two discard piles

### 2. Play Duo Pairs (Optional)

If you have matching **Duo pairs** in your hand, you may play them face-up in front of you to trigger their effects. You may play multiple Duo pairs in one turn.

| Duo Pair | Effect |
|----------|--------|
| **2 Crabs** | Browse one discard pile and take any card from it |
| **2 Boats** | Take another turn immediately |
| **2 Fish** | Draw 1 card from the draw pile |
| **Swimmer + Shark** | Steal 1 random card from another player's hand |

### 3. End the Round (Optional)

If your cards (in hand + in front of you) total **7 or more points**, you may choose to end the round by announcing one of:

**"STOP"** — The round ends immediately. All players reveal their hands and score their card points. No color bonus is awarded.

**"LAST CHANCE"** — Each other player takes one final turn, then all reveal hands.
- If the caller has the **highest or tied score**: They score their card points **plus** a color bonus (1 point per card of their most abundant color). Other players score only their color bonus.
- If the caller **does not** have the highest score: They score only their color bonus. Other players score their full card points.

## Card Types & Scoring

### Collection Cards (scored by quantity)

| Collection | Cards | Points by count |
|-----------|-------|-----------------|
| **Shells** | 6 cards | 0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 |
| **Octopus** | 5 cards | 0, 3, 6, 9, 12 |
| **Penguins** | 3 cards | 1, 3, 5 |
| **Sailors** | 2 cards | 0, 5 |

### Duo Cards (1 point per pair played)

Crab, Boat, Fish, Swimmer, Shark — each pair played is worth 1 point.

### Multiplier Cards

Boat, Fish, Penguin, and Captain (Sailor) multipliers each add 1 bonus point per matching card you have.

### Mermaid Cards

There are 4 Mermaid cards. If any player collects all 4, they **win the game immediately**.

## End of Round

Add round scores to cumulative totals. If no player has reached the target score, start a new round. The player to the left of the one who ended the previous round goes first.

**Special case**: If the draw pile runs out during a player's turn, the round ends immediately with **no scoring**.

## Winning

The first player to reach or exceed the **target score** wins. If multiple players cross the threshold in the same round, the player with the higher score wins.
rules.zh:
# 海盐折纸（Sea Salt & Paper）规则

## 概述

海盐折纸是一款 2-4 人的收集与冒险卡牌游戏，由 Bombyx 出版。以精美的折纸风格海洋生物为主题，玩家收集卡牌组成计分组合，打出配对牌触发特殊效果，并选择最佳时机结束每轮游戏。率先达到目标分数的玩家获胜。

## 组件

- 58 张游戏卡牌（折纸风格海洋生物，多种颜色）
- 4 张玩家提示卡
- 2 张卡牌分布参考卡

## 准备

1. 将 58 张游戏卡牌洗匀，面朝下作为抽牌堆。
2. 翻开**顶部 2 张**，面朝上放在牌堆旁边，形成**两个弃牌堆**。
3. 随机选择起始玩家。
4. 根据玩家人数确定**目标分数**：
   - **2 人局**：40 分
   - **3 人局**：35 分
   - **4 人局**：30 分

## 游戏流程

轮到你时，按顺序执行以下步骤：

### 1. 拿取一张牌（必须执行）

选择**一种**方式：
- **从牌堆抽取**：抽 2 张牌，保留 1 张，将另 1 张面朝上放到任一弃牌堆（如果有弃牌堆为空，优先放到空的那一堆）
- **从弃牌堆拿取**：从两个弃牌堆之一的顶部拿取 1 张

### 2. 打出配对牌（可选）

如果手中有匹配的**配对组合**，可以将它们面朝上放在面前触发效果。一回合可打出多组配对。

| 配对组合 | 效果 |
|---------|------|
| **2 只螃蟹** | 浏览一个弃牌堆，从中选取任意 1 张 |
| **2 艘小船** | 立即再进行一个回合 |
| **2 条鱼** | 从牌堆抽取 1 张 |
| **游泳者 + 鲨鱼** | 从另一位玩家手中随机偷取 1 张 |

### 3. 结束本轮（可选）

如果你的卡牌（手中 + 面前）总计达到 **7 分以上**，可以选择结束本轮，宣布以下其一：

**"停止"（STOP）** — 本轮立即结束。所有玩家亮出手牌并计算卡牌分数。不计算颜色奖励。

**"最后机会"（LAST CHANCE）** — 其他每位玩家各再进行一个回合，然后全部亮牌。
- 如果宣告者**得分最高或并列最高**：计算卡牌分数 **加上** 颜色奖励（最多颜色的卡牌数量即为奖励分）。其他玩家只计算颜色奖励。
- 如果宣告者**不是最高分**：只计算颜色奖励。其他玩家计算完整卡牌分数。

## 卡牌类型与计分

### 收集类卡牌（按数量计分）

| 收集 | 卡牌数 | 分数递进 |
|------|--------|---------|
| **贝壳** | 6 张 | 0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 |
| **章鱼** | 5 张 | 0, 3, 6, 9, 12 |
| **企鹅** | 3 张 | 1, 3, 5 |
| **水手** | 2 张 | 0, 5 |

### 配对牌（每组 1 分）

螃蟹、小船、鱼、游泳者、鲨鱼——每打出一组配对计 1 分。

### 倍率卡

小船、鱼、企鹅和船长（水手）的倍率卡各为每张对应卡牌加 1 分。

### 美人鱼卡

共 4 张美人鱼卡。如果有玩家收集齐全部 4 张，**立即赢得游戏**。

## 回合结束

将本轮分数累加到总分。如果没有玩家达到目标分数，开始新一轮。上一轮结束者左边的玩家先手。

**特殊情况**：如果牌堆在某玩家回合中用完，本轮立即结束且**不计分**。

## 获胜条件

率先达到或超过**目标分数**的玩家获胜。若同一轮中多名玩家超过目标分数，得分更高者获胜。

rules.en:
# Sanguosha (Legends of the Three Kingdoms) Rules

## Overview

Sanguosha is a Chinese card game inspired by the Romance of the Three Kingdoms. Players assume the identities of legendary heroes, each with unique abilities. Hidden roles determine each player's allegiance and victory condition.

## Components

- **Identity Cards** — 1 Monarch, 2 Loyalists, 4 Rebels, 1 Traitor (for 8 players)
- **Hero Cards** — 25+ heroes from the Three Kingdoms era, each with unique skills
- **Game Cards** — Basic cards (Slash, Dodge, Peach), Strategy cards (Scrolls), and Equipment cards
- **Health Cards** — To track each hero's remaining health

## Roles & Victory Conditions

| Role | Team | Objective |
|------|------|-----------|
| **Monarch (主公)** | Ruler | Eliminate all Rebels and the Traitor |
| **Loyalist (忠臣)** | Ruler | Protect the Monarch; eliminate Rebels and Traitor |
| **Rebel (反贼)** | Rebel | Eliminate the Monarch |
| **Traitor (内奸)** | Solo | Be the last player standing (Monarch eliminated last) |

Roles are kept secret except the Monarch, who reveals immediately.

## Setup

1. Select identity cards based on player count. Each player draws one face down. The Monarch reveals their identity.
2. The Monarch receives 5 hero cards to choose from; other players receive 3 each.
3. Each player selects a hero and reveals it. The Monarch gets +1 maximum health.
4. Starting from the Monarch (counterclockwise), each player draws 4 starting cards.

## Card Types

### Basic Cards
- **Slash (杀)** — Attack one player within range. Deals 1 damage if not dodged. Limit 1 per turn (unless hero ability says otherwise).
- **Dodge (闪)** — Played in response to negate one Slash.
- **Peach (桃)** — Restore 1 health to yourself (during your turn), or save a dying player (any time).

### Strategy Cards (Non-Delayed)
- **Something from Nothing (无中生有)** — Draw 2 cards for yourself.
- **Duel (决斗)** — Challenge one player. You alternate discarding Slashes; the first player who cannot takes 1 damage.
- **Archery Attack (万箭齐发)** — All other players must play a Dodge or take 1 damage.
- **Barbarian Assault (南蛮入侵)** — All other players must play a Slash or take 1 damage.
- **Dismantle (过河拆桥)** — Discard one card from any player (hand or equipped).
- **Snatch (顺手牵羊)** — Take one card from a player within distance 1.
- **Bountiful Harvest (五谷丰登)** — Reveal cards from deck equal to player count; each player picks one.
- **Peach Garden (桃园结义)** — All players recover 1 health (cannot exceed max).
- **Nullification (无懈可击)** — Cancel any strategy card. Can be played by anyone at any time.

### Strategy Cards (Delayed)
- **Contentment (乐不思蜀)** — Place on another player's judgment zone. On their turn, they judge: if NOT Hearts, skip their **Play Phase**.
- **Lightning (闪电)** — Place on your own judgment zone. Each turn it passes left. If judged Spade 2-9, deal 3 damage to that player.

### Equipment Cards
- **Weapons** — Increase attack range and may grant special effects.
- **Armor** — Provides passive protection.
- **+1 Horse (defensive)** — Other players' distance to you is increased by 1.
- **-1 Horse (offensive)** — Your distance to other players is decreased by 1.

## Turn Structure

Each turn consists of **six phases** in order:

1. **Preparation Phase** — Trigger start-of-turn abilities.
2. **Judgment Phase** — Resolve delayed strategy cards (Contentment, Lightning) in reverse order of placement.
3. **Draw Phase** — Draw 2 cards from the deck.
4. **Play Phase** — Play cards from your hand and use hero abilities. You may play at most 1 Slash per turn (unless modified by abilities/weapons).
5. **Discard Phase** — Discard down to your current health value.
6. **End Phase** — Trigger end-of-turn abilities.

## Key Rules

- **Range**: Adjacent players are at distance 1. Weapons and horses modify range.
- **Dying State**: When health reaches 0, the player enters a dying state. Any player may play a Peach to save them. If unsaved, they are eliminated.
- **Hand Limit**: At end of turn, hand size cannot exceed current health.

## Hero Abilities (Examples)

- **Zhuge Liang (诸葛亮)** — *Stargazing*: Rearrange top X cards of the deck. *Empty Fortress*: Cannot be targeted by Slash or Duel when hand is empty.
- **Zhang Fei (张飞)** — *Berserk*: No limit on Slashes per turn.
- **Zhen Ji (甄姬)** — *Goddess Luo*: Judge at start of turn — black result lets you keep the card. *Gorgeous*: Use black cards as Dodge.
- **Diao Chan (貂蝉)** — *Dissension*: Once per turn, force two male characters to Duel each other.

## Winning

- **Monarch + Loyalists** win when all Rebels and the Traitor are eliminated.
- **Rebels** win when the Monarch is eliminated (regardless of Rebels' survival).
- **Traitor** wins only when they are the last player alive.
rules.zh:
# 三国杀规则

## 概述

三国杀是一款以三国时期为背景的多人卡牌游戏。每位玩家扮演一位三国英雄，拥有独特的技能。隐藏的身份决定了每个人的阵营和胜利条件。

## 组件

- **身份牌** — 1 主公、2 忠臣、4 反贼、1 内奸（8 人局标准）
- **武将牌** — 25+ 三国武将，每位拥有独特技能
- **游戏牌** — 基本牌（杀、闪、桃）、锦囊牌和装备牌
- **体力牌** — 记录每位武将的当前体力

## 身份与胜利条件

| 身份 | 阵营 | 目标 |
|------|------|------|
| **主公** | 主公方 | 消灭所有反贼和内奸 |
| **忠臣** | 主公方 | 保护主公，消灭反贼和内奸 |
| **反贼** | 反贼方 | 消灭主公 |
| **内奸** | 独立 | 成为最后的存活者（主公必须最后消灭） |

除主公外，其他身份均保密。主公立即亮明身份。

## 准备

1. 根据人数选取身份牌，每人抽一张面朝下。主公亮明身份。
2. 主公获得 5 张武将牌选择；其他玩家各获得 3 张。
3. 每人选择一位武将并亮出。主公体力上限 +1。
4. 从主公开始（逆时针），每位玩家摸 4 张起始手牌。

## 卡牌类型

### 基本牌
- **杀** — 攻击范围内的一名玩家。未被闪抵消则造成 1 点伤害。每回合限用 1 次（除非武将技能另有说明）。
- **闪** — 响应时打出，抵消一张杀的效果。
- **桃** — 回复自己 1 点体力（自己回合内），或救活一名濒死角色（任何时候）。

### 锦囊牌（非延时类）
- **无中生有** — 自己摸 2 张牌。
- **决斗** — 与一名玩家决斗，双方轮流弃杀，先不出杀者受 1 点伤害。
- **万箭齐发** — 所有其他玩家需出闪，否则受 1 点伤害。
- **南蛮入侵** — 所有其他玩家需出杀，否则受 1 点伤害。
- **过河拆桥** — 弃置任意一名角色的一张牌（手牌或装备）。
- **顺手牵羊** — 拿取距离 1 以内一名角色的一张牌。
- **五谷丰登** — 从牌堆翻开等同于角色数量的牌，每人依次选一张。
- **桃园结义** — 所有角色恢复 1 点体力（不超过上限）。
- **无懈可击** — 抵消任意一张锦囊牌。任何人都可在任何时候打出。

### 锦囊牌（延时类）
- **乐不思蜀** — 放置于另一名角色的判定区。该角色判定：若结果不是红桃，跳过**出牌阶段**。
- **闪电** — 放置于自己判定区。每回合向左传递。若判定为黑桃 2-9，对该角色造成 3 点伤害。

### 装备牌
- **武器** — 增加攻击范围，部分附带特殊效果。
- **防具** — 提供被动防护。
- **+1 马（防御马）** — 其他角色计算与你的距离 +1。
- **-1 马（进攻马）** — 你计算与其他角色的距离 -1。

## 回合流程

每个回合包含 **六个阶段**，依次执行：

1. **准备阶段** — 触发回合开始的技能。
2. **判定阶段** — 按放入的逆序处理判定区内的延时锦囊（乐不思蜀、闪电）。
3. **摸牌阶段** — 从牌堆摸 2 张牌。
4. **出牌阶段** — 使用手牌和武将技能。每回合限出 1 张杀（除非受技能/武器影响）。
5. **弃牌阶段** — 手牌数须弃至当前体力值。
6. **结束阶段** — 触发回合结束的技能。

## 核心规则

- **距离**：相邻玩家距离为 1。武器和马匹可改变距离。
- **濒死状态**：体力降至 0 时进入濒死状态，任何角色可用桃救活。无人救援则阵亡。
- **手牌上限**：回合结束时，手牌数不能超过当前体力值。

## 武将技能（示例）

- **诸葛亮** — *观星*：查看并排列牌堆顶部 X 张牌。*空城*：手牌为零时不能成为杀和决斗的目标。
- **张飞** — *咆哮*：每回合不限出杀次数。
- **甄姬** — *洛神*：回合开始判定，黑色结果可获得判定牌。*倾国*：可用黑色手牌当闪使用。
- **貂蝉** — *离间*：每回合一次，可强制两名男性角色决斗。

## 获胜条件

- **主公 + 忠臣**：反贼和内奸全部阵亡时获胜。
- **反贼**：主公阵亡时获胜（无论反贼自身是否存活）。
- **内奸**：成为最后存活的唯一玩家时获胜。

rules.en:
# Sanguosha: Disloyal Minister Rules

## Overview

Disloyal Minister (不臣之君) is a 2026 expansion for Sanguosha (Legends of the Three Kingdoms) that revolutionizes the classic identity game mode. Instead of new hero characters, it introduces **7 brand-new identity modes** that fundamentally change how the game's faction dynamics work. Supports 4-8 players. **Requires the Sanguosha base game.**

## Components

- Identity mode cards for 7 new game modes
- Exclusive heroes: Liu Hong (刘宏), Dong Zhuo (董卓), Zhang Jiao (张角)
- Mode-specific role cards and rule cards

## The 7 Identity Modes

This expansion contains 7 distinct identity configurations, each creating a unique social deduction experience. Each mode modifies which roles exist, their win conditions, and how alliances work.

### Key Design Philosophy

Unlike the standard Monarch/Loyalist/Rebel/Spy setup, these modes introduce:
- **Asymmetric information** — some modes give certain players more knowledge
- **Shifting alliances** — some roles can change allegiance mid-game
- **New role types** — including Tyrant (暴君), Madman (失心疯), and others
- **Variable player counts** — each mode specifies its optimal player range

## How to Use

1. Choose one of the 7 identity modes before the game begins.
2. Distribute the mode-specific role cards according to the chosen mode's setup rules.
3. Follow the standard Sanguosha turn structure (Judge → Draw → Play → Discard → End).
4. Win conditions vary by mode — refer to the specific mode's role cards.

## General Rules

- All standard Sanguosha game mechanics remain in effect (basic cards, strategy cards, equipment, hero abilities).
- The expansion's exclusive heroes (Liu Hong, Dong Zhuo, Zhang Jiao) have abilities designed to synergize with the new identity modes.
- Some modes may modify specific rules (e.g., what happens when a player is eliminated).

> **Note:** The detailed rules for each of the 7 identity modes are printed on the included mode cards. Please refer to the physical rulebook and mode cards for the specific setup, roles, and victory conditions of each mode.

# 三国杀：不臣之君 规则

## 概述

《不臣之君》是三国杀 2026 年推出的身份玩法扩展包，它彻底革新了经典的身份局模式。这不是武将扩充，而是引入了 **7 种全新身份玩法**，从根本上改变游戏的阵营对抗机制。支持 4-8 人游玩。**需要三国杀本体游戏。**

## 组件

- 7 种新玩法的身份模式卡
- 专属武将：刘宏、董卓、张角
- 各模式专用的身份牌和规则卡

## 7 种身份模式

本扩展包含 7 种截然不同的身份配置，每种都创造出独特的社交推理体验。每种模式改变了存在的身份、胜利条件以及联盟运作方式。

### 核心设计理念

不同于标准的主公/忠臣/反贼/内奸设置，这些模式引入了：
- **不对称信息** — 部分模式中某些玩家拥有更多信息
- **变化的联盟** — 某些身份可以在游戏中途改变阵营
- **全新身份类型** — 包括暴君、失心疯等
- **灵活的人数配置** — 每种模式有其最佳玩家人数

## 使用方法

1. 在游戏开始前选择 7 种身份模式之一。
2. 根据所选模式的设置规则分发对应的身份牌。
3. 遵循标准的三国杀回合流程（判定阶段 → 摸牌阶段 → 出牌阶段 → 弃牌阶段 → 结束阶段）。
4. 胜利条件因模式而异 — 参考具体模式的身份牌说明。

## 通用规则

- 三国杀的所有标准游戏机制保持不变（基本牌、锦囊牌、装备牌、武将技能）。
- 扩展包的专属武将（刘宏、董卓、张角）拥有与新身份模式协同设计的技能。
- 某些模式可能会修改特定规则（如玩家被淘汰时的处理方式）。

> **提示：** 7 种身份模式的详细规则印在随盒附带的模式卡上。请参考实体规则书和模式卡了解每种模式的具体设置、身份和胜利条件。

# Modern Art Rules

## Overview

Modern Art is an auction game designed by Reiner Knizia. Players take on the role of art dealers buying and selling paintings from five different artists over four rounds. Each round, paintings are auctioned off using different auction types. At the end of each round, paintings are sold to the bank at market value. The player with the most money at the end wins.

## Components

- 70 painting cards (5 artists)
- Money tokens (in various denominations)
- 1 market value board
- 12 artist value tiles
- 5 player screens

## Artists & Card Distribution

| Artist | Cards |
|--------|-------|
| Manuel Carvalho (Lite Metal) | 12 |
| Sigrid Thaler (Yoko) | 13 |
| Daniel Melim (Christin P.) | 14 |
| Ramon Martins (Karl Gitter) | 15 |
| Rafael Silveira (Krypto) | 16 |

*(Artist names vary by edition; card counts remain the same.)*

## Setup

1. Each player receives **100** in starting money (hidden behind their screen).
2. Place the market value board in the center.
3. Shuffle all 70 painting cards and deal starting hands based on player count:
   - **3 players**: 10 cards each
   - **4 players**: 9 cards each
   - **5 players**: 8 cards each
4. Place remaining cards face down as the draw pile.
5. The youngest player goes first as the Auctioneer.

## How to Play

On your turn, play one painting card from your hand and conduct the auction indicated on the card.

## Auction Types

### Open Auction
Starting from the player to the left of the Auctioneer, players bid freely. Each bid must exceed the previous. The highest bidder pays the Auctioneer and takes the painting. If no one bids, the Auctioneer gets it for free.

### Once Around
Starting left of the Auctioneer, each player gets exactly one chance to bid or pass. The Auctioneer bids last. Highest bid wins.

### Sealed Auction
All players (including the Auctioneer) secretly hold money in their fist. Reveal simultaneously. Highest bidder wins. Ties go to the player closest to the Auctioneer's left.

### Fixed Price
The Auctioneer sets a price. Starting left, each player may buy at that price or pass. If no one buys, the Auctioneer **must** buy it at that price from the bank.

### Double Auction
The Auctioneer plays the card and may pair it with a second painting **from the same artist** in their hand. If they cannot or choose not to, the next player clockwise may contribute a matching card. The pair is auctioned as one lot using Open Auction rules. The player who contributed the second card splits the payment with the Auctioneer.

## Rounds & Scoring

A round ends immediately when the **5th painting** of any single artist is played. That 5th card is **not** auctioned — it is discarded.

### Market Value

After each round, rank the top 3 artists by number of paintings sold (auctioned) that round:
- **1st place**: 30,000 per painting
- **2nd place**: 20,000 per painting
- **3rd place**: 10,000 per painting
- **4th–5th place**: 0 (worthless)

Place the corresponding value tile (30/20/10) on the market value board in that artist's column for the current round. Ties are broken by the order of artists on the board.

### Cumulative Value

An artist's market value is the **sum of all value tiles** in their column across all rounds played so far. So an artist who placed 1st in round 1 (30) and 2nd in round 2 (20) would be worth 50 per painting in round 2.

### Selling to the Bank

After determining values, each player sells all paintings they purchased this round to the bank at their current market value. Unsold paintings from your hand are worthless.

### New Round

Deal additional cards from the draw pile:
- **Rounds 2 & 3** — 3 players: 6 cards; 4 players: 4 cards; 5 players: 3 cards
- **Round 4** — No new cards dealt

## End Game

After 4 rounds, the player with the **most total money** (including all earnings from painting sales) wins.
rules.zh:
# 现代艺术规则

## 概述

《现代艺术》是 Reiner Knizia 设计的拍卖类桌游。玩家扮演艺术品经销商，在四个回合中买卖五位不同画家的画作。每回合通过不同的拍卖方式出售画作，回合末将画作按市场价值卖给银行。最终金钱最多的玩家获胜。

## 组件

- 70 张画作卡（5 位画家）
- 金钱代币（多种面额）
- 1 张市场价值板
- 12 个画家价值标记
- 5 个玩家屏风

## 画家与卡牌分布

| 画家 | 卡牌数 |
|------|--------|
| Manuel Carvalho (Lite Metal) | 12 |
| Sigrid Thaler (Yoko) | 13 |
| Daniel Melim (Christin P.) | 14 |
| Ramon Martins (Karl Gitter) | 15 |
| Rafael Silveira (Krypto) | 16 |

*（画家名字因版本而异，卡牌数量不变。）*

## 准备

1. 每位玩家获得 **100** 起始资金（隐藏在屏风后）。
2. 将市场价值板放在中央。
3. 洗匀全部 70 张画作卡，根据玩家人数分发起始手牌：
   - **3 人局**：每人 10 张
   - **4 人局**：每人 9 张
   - **5 人局**：每人 8 张
4. 剩余卡牌面朝下作为牌堆。
5. 最年轻的玩家先手，担任拍卖师。

## 游戏流程

轮到你时，从手牌打出 1 张画作卡，按卡面标注的拍卖方式进行拍卖。

## 拍卖类型

### 公开拍卖
从拍卖师左侧玩家开始自由叫价。每次出价必须高于前一次。出价最高者向拍卖师支付金额并获得画作。无人出价则拍卖师免费获得。

### 一轮拍卖
从拍卖师左侧开始，每位玩家只有一次出价或放弃的机会。拍卖师最后出价。最高出价者获胜。

### 暗标拍卖
所有玩家（含拍卖师）秘密将钱握在手中，同时亮出。出价最高者获胜。平局时按距拍卖师的左侧距离决定。

### 一口价拍卖
拍卖师定一个价格。从左侧开始，每位玩家可以选择以该价格购买或跳过。无人购买则拍卖师**必须**以该价格从银行买下。

### 双画拍卖
拍卖师打出卡牌后，可以从手中再配一张**同一画家**的画作。如果不配或没有，顺时针下一位玩家可以贡献一张匹配的卡。两张作为一组按公开拍卖规则拍卖。贡献第二张卡的玩家与拍卖师分享拍卖所得。

## 回合与计分

当某位画家的**第 5 张画作**被打出时，该回合立即结束。第 5 张不进行拍卖——直接弃掉。

### 市场价值

每回合结束后，按本回合出售画作数量排名前 3 的画家获得收益：
- **第 1 名**：每张画作 30,000
- **第 2 名**：每张画作 20,000
- **第 3 名**：每张画作 10,000
- **第 4-5 名**：0（无价值）

在市场价值板对应画家列的当前回合行放置价值标记（30/20/10）。平局按画家在价值板上的顺序决定。

### 累计价值

画家的市场价值是其列中**所有回合价值标记的总和**。例如，某画家第 1 回合获得 30，第 2 回合获得 20，则第 2 回合每张画作价值为 50。

### 向银行出售

确定价值后，每位玩家将本回合购得的画作按当前市场价值卖给银行。手中未售出的画作无价值。

### 新回合

从牌堆补发手牌：
- **第 2、3 回合** — 3 人局：6 张；4 人局：4 张；5 人局：3 张
- **第 4 回合** — 不补发手牌

## 游戏结束

4 个回合后，**总金钱最多**的玩家获胜。

rules.en:
# UNO Rules

## Overview

UNO is the classic family card game where players take turns matching a card in their hand with the current card shown on top of the discard pile by color, number, or symbol. Be the first to empty your hand — but don't forget to yell "UNO!" when you're down to your last card.

## Components

108 cards total:

| Color | Number cards | Action cards |
|-------|-------------|--------------|
| Blue | 1× 0, 2× each 1-9 | 2× Skip, 2× Reverse, 2× Draw Two |
| Green | 1× 0, 2× each 1-9 | 2× Skip, 2× Reverse, 2× Draw Two |
| Red | 1× 0, 2× each 1-9 | 2× Skip, 2× Reverse, 2× Draw Two |
| Yellow | 1× 0, 2× each 1-9 | 2× Skip, 2× Reverse, 2× Draw Two |
| Wild | — | 4× Wild, 4× Wild Draw Four |

## Setup

1. Shuffle the deck.
2. Deal 7 cards to each player.
3. Place the remaining deck face down as the draw pile.
4. Turn over the top card to start the discard pile.

**Special first card rules:**
- If the first card is a **Wild** or **Wild Draw Four** — shuffle it back and draw again.
- If it's a **Skip** — the first player (left of dealer) is skipped.
- If it's a **Reverse** — the dealer goes first instead.
- If it's a **Draw Two** — the first player draws 2 cards and loses their turn.

## How to Play

On your turn, play **one** card from your hand that matches the top discard by:
- **Color** — Same color
- **Number** — Same number
- **Symbol** — Same action symbol
- **Wild cards** — Can always be played

If you cannot play, draw **one** card from the draw pile. You may play it immediately if it matches; otherwise your turn ends.

### UNO! Rule
When playing your **second-to-last card**, you must call out **"UNO!"** before the next player begins their turn. If another player catches you failing to say UNO, you must draw **2 penalty cards**.

## Action Cards

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Skip** | Next player loses their turn |
| **Reverse** | Reverses the direction of play (2-player game: acts like Skip) |
| **Draw Two (+2)** | Next player draws 2 cards AND loses their turn |
| **Wild** | Choose any color to continue play |
| **Wild Draw Four (+4)** | Choose any color; next player draws 4 cards AND loses their turn |

### The +4 Challenge Rule
You may ONLY play a Wild Draw Four if you have **no cards matching the current color**. If you are challenged:
1. The next player may accept or challenge.
2. If challenged, you must show your hand.
3. If you **are** holding a matching color card: **you** draw 4 cards instead.
4. If you **are not** holding a matching color card: the challenger draws **6 cards** instead.

## Winning a Round

The first player to empty their hand wins the round.

## Scoring

Points are scored from all cards remaining in opponents' hands:

| Card Type | Points |
|-----------|--------|
| Number cards 0-9 | Face value |
| Skip / Reverse / Draw Two | 20 |
| Wild / Wild Draw Four | 50 |

First player to reach **500 points** wins the game.

## Alternative: Quick Play

Simply play one round. The first player to empty their hand wins immediately — no cumulative scoring needed.
rules.zh:
# UNO 规则

## 概述

UNO 是经典的家庭卡牌游戏。玩家轮流打出手牌，需要与弃牌堆顶部的牌在颜色、数字或符号上匹配。率先清空手牌即可获胜——但当手牌只剩最后一张时，别忘了大喊"UNO！"

## 组件

共 108 张牌：

| 颜色 | 数字牌 | 功能牌 |
|------|--------|--------|
| 蓝 | 1× 0，2× 各 1-9 | 2× 跳过，2× 反转，2× +2 |
| 绿 | 1× 0，2× 各 1-9 | 2× 跳过，2× 反转，2× +2 |
| 红 | 1× 0，2× 各 1-9 | 2× 跳过，2× 反转，2× +2 |
| 黄 | 1× 0，2× 各 1-9 | 2× 跳过，2× 反转，2× +2 |
| 万能 | — | 4× 万能牌，4× 万能 +4 |

## 准备

1. 洗匀牌堆。
2. 每位玩家发 7 张牌。
3. 剩余牌面向下作为抽牌堆。
4. 翻开最上面一张牌作为弃牌堆起点。

**首张牌特殊规则：**
- 若是**万能牌**或**万能 +4** — 洗回牌堆重新翻。
- 若是**跳过** — 起始玩家（庄家左侧）被跳过。
- 若是**反转** — 庄家先出牌。
- 若是 **+2** — 起始玩家抽 2 张并跳过回合。

## 游戏流程

轮到你的回合时，打出**一张**与弃牌堆顶部匹配的手牌：
- **颜色** — 颜色相同
- **数字** — 数字相同
- **符号** — 功能符号相同
- **万能牌** — 随时可打出

如果无法出牌，从抽牌堆抽**一张**。抽到的牌若符合条件可立即打出，否则回合结束。

### UNO 规则
打出**倒数第二张**手牌时，必须在下一轮开始前大声喊出 **"UNO!"**。如果被其他玩家抢先指出未喊 UNO，罚抽 **2 张**。

## 功能牌

| 卡牌 | 效果 |
|------|------|
| **跳过** | 下一位玩家跳过回合 |
| **反转** | 改变出牌方向（2 人局效果等同跳过） |
| **+2** | 下家抽 2 张并跳过回合 |
| **万能牌** | 指定接下来的颜色 |
| **万能 +4** | 指定颜色，下家抽 4 张并跳过回合 |

### +4 质疑规则
万能 +4 只能在你**没有当前颜色牌**时打出。如果被质疑：
1. 下家可以选择接受或质疑。
2. 若被质疑，你必须展示手牌。
3. 如果你**有**当前颜色的牌：**你**抽 4 张作为惩罚。
4. 如果你**没有**当前颜色的牌：质疑者抽 **6 张**作为惩罚。

## 单局获胜

率先出完所有手牌的玩家赢得该局。

## 计分

根据所有对手剩余手牌计分：

| 卡牌类型 | 分值 |
|---------|------|
| 数字牌 0-9 | 面值 |
| 跳过 / 反转 / +2 | 20 |
| 万能牌 / 万能 +4 | 50 |

率先累计达到 **500 分**的玩家赢得整场游戏。

## 替代玩法：快速模式

只玩一局，率先清空手牌的玩家直接获胜——不需要累计计分。

rules.en:
# UNO Flip Rules

## Overview

UNO Flip is a twist on classic UNO featuring a double-sided deck. The deck has a **Light Side** (gentle, similar to classic UNO) and a **Dark Side** (harsh, with more punitive action cards). Players must flip the deck between sides during play and be the first to empty their hand.

## Components

- 112 double-sided cards (Light Side / Dark Side)
- Each side has its own set of action cards

## Setup

1. Choose a dealer. Shuffle the deck with the Light Side facing up.
2. Deal 7 cards to each player, Light Side up.
3. Place the remaining deck in the center as the draw pile.
4. Flip the top card to start the discard pile. If it's an action card, follow its effect.

## Light Side Cards

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Draw One** (Blue/Green/Yellow/Red) | Next player draws 1 card and skips their turn |
| **Reverse** | Reverses direction of play |
| **Skip** | Next player loses their turn |
| **Flip** | All players flip the deck AND their hands to the Dark Side |
| **Wild** | Player chooses the next color |
| **Wild Draw Two** | Player chooses color; next player draws 2 and loses turn |

## Dark Side Cards

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Draw Five** | Next player draws 5 cards and skips their turn |
| **Reverse** | Reverses direction of play |
| **Skip Everyone** | All other players lose their turn |
| **Flip** | All players flip the deck AND their hands back to the Light Side |
| **Wild** | Player chooses the next color |
| **Wild Draw Color** | Next player draws until they get the chosen color, then loses turn |

## How to Play

1. On your turn, play a card matching the top of the discard pile by **color**, **number**, or **symbol**.
2. If you cannot play, draw one card. You may play it immediately if it matches.
3. When playing your second-to-last card, say **"UNO!"** before your next turn begins. If caught not saying it, draw 2 penalty cards.
4. The Flip card switches the entire game between Light Side and Dark Side. When flipped, all cards in hand and the draw/discard piles are turned over.

## Winning

The first player to empty their hand wins the round. Points are scored from opponents' remaining cards:

| Card Type | Points |
|-----------|--------|
| Number cards | Face value |
| Draw One / Draw Five | 10 |
| Reverse / Skip / Skip Everyone / Flip | 20 |
| Wild | 40 |
| Wild Draw Two / Wild Draw Color | 50 |

First to 500 points wins the game.
rules.zh:
# UNO Flip 规则

## 概述

UNO Flip 是经典 UNO 的变体，采用双面卡牌设计。牌堆分为**光明面**（温和，类似经典 UNO）和**黑暗面**（惩罚性更强）。玩家需要在游戏中翻转牌堆，并率先出完所有手牌。

## 组件

- 112 张双面卡牌（光明面 / 黑暗面）
- 每面有各自的一套功能牌

## 准备

1. 选定庄家。牌堆以光明面朝上洗匀。
2. 每位玩家发 7 张牌，光明面朝上。
3. 剩余牌堆放在中央作为抽牌堆。
4. 翻开最上面一张牌作为弃牌堆起点。如果是功能牌，执行其效果。

## 光明面卡牌

| 卡牌 | 效果 |
|------|------|
| **罚抽一张**（蓝/绿/黄/红） | 下家抽 1 张牌并跳过回合 |
| **反转** | 改变出牌方向 |
| **跳过** | 下家跳过回合 |
| **翻转** | 所有玩家将牌堆和手牌翻至黑暗面 |
| **万能牌** | 指定下一种颜色 |
| **万能罚抽两张** | 指定颜色，下家抽 2 张并跳过回合 |

## 黑暗面卡牌

| 卡牌 | 效果 |
|------|------|
| **罚抽五张** | 下家抽 5 张牌并跳过回合 |
| **反转** | 改变出牌方向 |
| **跳过所有人** | 其他所有玩家跳过回合 |
| **翻转** | 所有玩家将牌堆和手牌翻回光明面 |
| **万能牌** | 指定下一种颜色 |
| **万能罚抽颜色** | 下家需一直抽牌直到抽到指定颜色，然后跳过回合 |

## 游戏流程

1. 轮到你时，打出一张与弃牌堆顶部**颜色**、**数字**或**符号**匹配的牌。
2. 如果没有可出的牌，抽 1 张牌。如果抽到的牌符合出牌条件，可立即打出。
3. 打出倒数第二张牌时，必须在下一轮开始前喊出 **"UNO!"**。如果被他人抢先指出未喊 UNO，罚抽 2 张牌。
4. 翻转牌会将整个游戏在光明面和黑暗面之间切换。翻转后，手牌和牌堆全部翻面。

## 获胜条件

率先出完手牌的玩家赢得该轮。根据对手剩余手牌计分：

| 卡牌类型 | 分值 |
|---------|------|
| 数字牌 | 面值 |
| 罚抽一张 / 罚抽五张 | 10 |
| 反转 / 跳过 / 跳过所有人 / 翻转 | 20 |
| 万能牌 | 40 |
| 万能罚抽两张 / 万能罚抽颜色 | 50 |

先累计达到 500 分的玩家赢得整局游戏。
